name: Curried Carrot Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Carrots, scraped and coarsely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, egg, 1 tablespoon vegetable oil, and beer to make a smooth batter.
2. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap and let it rest at room temperature for several hours (or refrigerate overnight).
3. Stir in curry powder.
4. Beat egg white until stiff and fold it into the batter.
5. Gently fold in carrots.
6. Drop large spoonfuls of mixture into 375-degree vegetable oil and cook about one minute on each side. The oil doesn't need to be more than one inch deep for this.
7. Remove fritters with a slotted spoon and let them drain on paper towels.
8. Serve hot. Makes four servings.
